# HMSegmentedControl (vendored)

Vendored from [HeshamMegid/HMSegmentedControl](https://github.com/HeshamMegid/HMSegmentedControl) tag **v1.5.6** (MIT).

RNN vendors this library so consuming apps do not need a CocoaPods Trunk resolution for `HMSegmentedControl` when installing from npm/autolinking.

See `LICENSE.md` in this directory for the upstream license.
